title: Derks et al. 2022 (Nat. Biotechnol.) - plexDIA DIA-NN report.tsv output
author: Gatto, Laurent
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0

steps.instruction: Single cell proteomics data acquired by the Slavov Lab using the plexDIA protocol. It contains quantitative information from pancreatic ductal acinar cells (PDAC; HPAF-II), melanoma cells (WM989-A6-G3) and monocytes (U-937) at precursor and protein level. The each run acquired 3 samples thanks to mTRAQ multiplexing. The data were downloaded from: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1pUC2zgXKtKYn22mlor0lmUDK0frgwL_- -> DIANN_outputs -> wJD1146_1193_1200_tsvLib -> Report.tsv The file is reshare here allow its dissemination via the MsDataHub package.
